scripts.build: npm run recipes:validate && vite build && vite build --ssr src/entry-server.tsx --outDir .ssg && node scripts/build-seo.mjs
scripts.build:v1: npm run recipes:validate:v1 && npm run typecheck:v1 && npm run test:v1 && npm run build:client:v1 && npm run build:ssr:v1 && npm run seo:build:v1 && npm run seo:validate:v1 && node scripts/verify-versioned-stage.mjs v1
scripts.build:v2: npm run recipes:validate:v2 && npm run typecheck:v2 && npm run test:v2 && npm run build:client:v2 && npm run build:ssr:v2 && node scripts/build-seo.mjs v2 && node scripts/validate-seo.mjs v2 && node scripts/verify-versioned-stage.mjs v2
scripts.build:versions: npm run build:v1 && npm run build:v2
scripts.recipes:validate: node scripts/validate-recipe-code-format.mjs v1 && node scripts/validate-recipe-code-format.mjs v2 && tsc -p tsconfig.recipe-snippets.v1.json && tsc -p tsconfig.recipe-snippets.v2.json
scripts.package-bindings:build: vite build --config config/package-bindings/vite.package-binding-client.config.mts --mode v1 && vite build --config config/package-bindings/vite.package-binding-client.config.mts --mode v2 && vite build --config config/package-bindings/vite.package-binding-ssr.config.mts --mode v1 && vite build --config config/package-bindings/vite.package-binding-ssr.config.mts --mode v2
scripts.package-bindings:test: vitest run --config config/package-bindings/vite.package-binding-test.config.mts --mode v1 && vitest run --config config/package-bindings/vite.package-binding-test.config.mts --mode v2
scripts.package-bindings:verify: npm run package-bindings:typecheck && npm run package-bindings:snippets && npm run package-bindings:build && npm run package-bindings:test && node scripts/verify-package-binding.mjs v1 && node scripts/verify-package-binding.mjs v2
